## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is on track: 4 articles published, 4 in review, 5 in progress](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [SEO performance stable: slight decrease in clicks, increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Branded vs. non-branded search ratio hit ideal 60-40 split in May](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Non-branded impressions doubled from \~50-60K to over 100K, showing positive SEO trend](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [4 articles published last week, 4 more in review](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [5 articles in progress for current week](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Cody to review \~24 proposed topics in content table](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Some blogs approved yesterday, more to be reviewed today](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

### SEO Performance Analysis

  - [Clicks slightly decreased, impressions increased marginally](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Stable performance across content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Data sharing, ETL, ELT content driving majority of traffic](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Newer topics (data quality, analytics, data pipeline) generating significant impressions](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [AI overviews showing up frequently, potentially suppressing clicks](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)

### Conversion Metrics

  - [1 additional ebook download from blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Return direct traffic slightly down but average remains high](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Branded vs. non-branded search breakdown for May:](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [Nearly ideal 60-40 split (60% branded, 40% non-branded)](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
      - [Non-branded impressions increased from \~50-60K to over 100K](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

### Historical Data Request

  - [Matt requested all-time version of branded vs. non-branded chart](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Vivek to investigate if data before February 2023 is available in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Quarterly Dashboard

  - [Vivek to request updated quarterly dashboard from Evan (via Ashley)](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Dashboard includes ICP visits to each article](https://fathom.video/share/wyozh-Lv2_wxa7qRBf6yxiebvmkDVgzj?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
